name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: Austin, TX – First Cash Pawn at Research Blvd offers quick loans on jewelry, electronics, and valuables with flexible terms.
description_long:
First Cash Pawn on Research Blvd in Austin serves customers Monday through Saturday (10AM–7PM weekdays, 10AM–6PM Saturday; closed Sunday). Located in north Austin, TX, this standalone pawn shop is easily accessible for quick transactions.

This Research Blvd location in Austin offers the full range of pawn services: fast cash loans against jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and collectibles. Call +1 512-506-8415 to discuss terms or ask about specific items before visiting.

Austin residents appreciate First Cash Pawn for transparent lending terms and fair valuations. Bring photo ID and the item you're pawning; most transactions complete in minutes. Whether you need emergency cash or want to buy discounted items, this Austin shop delivers straightforward service without hidden fees.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, and Latin America provide extensive accessibility
Non-recourse loans mean no debt collection or credit impact if collateral is not reclaimed
No credit check required; serves credit-constrained consumers who cannot qualify elsewhere
Publicly traded company (S&P MidCap 400, Russell 2000) with transparent financial reporting and regulatory oversight
Multiple services beyond loans: retail sales, gold buying, layaway plans, and merchandise options
Same-day cash payout on pawn loans and merchandise sales
Wide range of merchandise accepted: jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, instruments
cons: Risk of losing valuable personal property permanently if unable to repay pawn loan within agreed timeframe
Pawn loan interest rates can be high; final cost depends on state-by-state regulations and individual store rates
Items are valued at wholesale/discounted rates rather than retail value, reducing loan amounts for personal property
Layaway service requires 10% down payment upfront with additional payments before merchandise can be taken home
Limited to consumers with physical items of value to pledge; not helpful for those without collateral
best_for: Consumers with urgent short-term cash needs ($100-$5,000) who lack access to traditional credit or loans
People with items of value (jewelry, electronics, instruments) they're willing to temporarily pledge as collateral
Credit-constrained borrowers who want to avoid payday loans and debt obligations that impact credit scores
Individuals seeking to buy discounted merchandise or use layaway services for planned purchases
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for credit-constrained consumers with valuable personal property who need immediate cash and want to avoid payday loans or credit damage. The main caveat is that pawn loans carry the risk of permanently losing pledged items if unable to repay, and effective interest rates vary significantly by state and individual store policies. This is a legitimate alternative to predatory lending, but not a debt solution for those without collateral.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (non-recourse, no credit check)
Gold, silver, and precious metal buying at cash-on-spot rates
Retail merchandise sales (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Layaway plans with 10% down payment option
Merchandise buying (they purchase items of value from consumers)
Store locator to find nearest of 3,300+ locations
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through subsidiary AFF (15,000+ merchant partners)
FAQ and educational resources on how pawn loans work
Online inventory browsing for merchandise availability
meta_description: First Cash Pawn at Research Blvd, Austin, TX. Quick loans on jewelry, electronics, and valuables.
